'''Clan Fenn''' was a famous and influential [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] family on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]]. Among its members were [[Ro Fenn]] and [[Kh'aris Fenn]]. Ro Fenn was in the [[Twi'lek Ruling Council|Twi'lek Clan Council]] and when [[Pol Secura]] died, Ro was sent into the [[Bright Lands]]. Another member was [[Rh'ajah Fenn]]. [[Swilja Fenn]] was a member during the [[New Jedi Order]].
"Fenn" meant "industrious" or "hard-working" in [[Twi'leki/Legends|Twi'leki]].
